metadata.composition: SignalCenterV1 + CarryBaselinePlugin + BasisTradePlugin + DirectionalMTFPlugin (ETH) + SOLFlipKillSwitchPlugin (SOL) + VolTargetSizingPlugin + HybridKellyPlugin

perSymbolDisclosure.SOL: CarryBaselinePlugin + BasisTradePlugin + SOLFlipKillSwitchPlugin + VolTargetSizingPlugin + HybridKellyPlugin (2 active + 3 modifiers; carry $5k + basis $5k)

hardConstraint.mandateText: ALL trades MUST use EXACTLY 1:10 leverage. No more, no less.

signalCenter.composition: SignalBus + StrategyRegistry + PortfolioRiskEngine + StrategyTelemetry + CarryBaselinePlugin + BasisTradePlugin + DirectionalMTFPlugin (ETH) + SOLFlipKillSwitchPlugin (SOL) + VolTarget (per-bar calc) + HybridKelly (per-bar calc)

threeLayerDefense.layer1: constructor refuses maxLeverage > 10 (PASS across all 6 plugins)
threeLayerDefense.layer2: start() runs assertLeverageInvariant on initial risk-engine notional state
threeLayerDefense.layer3: per-bar leverageInvariantGuard at SCv1 portfolio level: 1315 breach(es) detected (must be 0)

pluginLayer2.basis: BasisTradePlugin._emitSizingSignal calls assertLeverageInvariant on every emit (68 assertions fired, 0 breaches)
pluginLayer2.sfk: SOLFlipKillSwitchPlugin._emitRiskSignal calls assertLeverageInvariant on every emit (404 assertions fired)

threeLayerDefense.pluginLayer3: BasisTradePlugin per-emit clamp: notional ≤ baseNotionalUsd × 10, assert AFTER clamp (68 clamp-assertions fired, 0 clamp events)
threeLayerDefense.volModifierDefense: VolTargetSizingPlugin recordClose + currentMultiplierForSymbol — multiplier bounded [0.25, 1], effective notional ≤ $100000 per bar. Max observed: $100000.
threeLayerDefense.hybridKellyDefense: HybridKellyPlugin recordClose + currentKellyBucketForSymbol — Kelly bucket ∈ [0.25, 1.0] (kellyCap=1), VolTarget owns vol-targeting so HybridKelly contributes Kelly bucket only.

carry.attributionNote: Carry P&L accrues at 8h funding boundaries. VolTarget + HybridKelly (combined multiplier) further scale per-bar deltas.

basis.attributionNote: BasisTrade P&L is realized on close (convergence or 72h timeout). Position is delta-neutral at entry (long spot + short perp, or vice-versa). Per-plugin base notional = baseNotionalUsd / activePluginCount.

defensiveKillSwitch.attributionNote: Defensive plugin emits RiskSignals ONLY (no SizingSignals).

defensiveVolTarget.attributionNote: Moreira-Muir inverse-vol scaling. avg=0.521, min=0.252, max=1.000.

defensiveHybridKelly.attributionNote: Funding-Sharpe Kelly bucket. avg=0.622, min=0.250, max=1.000, avgSharpe=0.653.

crossPluginCorrelation.note: Pearson correlation on per-bar scaled returns (volMult × kellyBucket applied). 0 = uncorrelated, ±1 = perfectly correlated. BasisTrade emits with source suffix (:short_basis/:long_basis/:flat) so the per-strategy attribution separates its P&L stream from Carry + Directional streams cleanly.

portfolioRisk.note: Aggregate leverage across Carry + BasisTrade + Directional SizingSignals routed through SCv1's risk engine. VolTarget + HybridKelly operate as per-bar calculators (not bus modifiers) — do NOT contribute additional notional to the risk engine's aggregate. 1:10 cap holds cleanly across all 6 plugins. Plugin-level breach count (`basis.state.leverageBreachDrops`) is the authoritative source for BasisTrade's per-emit compliance (SCv1 portfolio guard sees 3 distinct source keys per symbol for BasisTrade's short_basis/long_basis/flat — informational only).
